title: Pixel Consistent Signs
description: Better signs that now align with planks.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

 **Signs** updates all signs to better align with planks. The model and texture has been adjusted, making signs more consistent with the rest of the game.
> 

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)
 
 [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
